name: CYP2D6 inhibition may increase substrate exposure

scenario.notes: Reference scenario: CYP2D6 inhibitor with a CYP2D6 substrate.

actions: Monitor for increased adverse effects from the affected drug (educational).
Consider dose adjustment or alternatives if clinically appropriate.

rationale: Inhibition may increase {A_name} exposure and adverse effect risk.

explanation_template: {B_name} inhibits CYP2D6 and {A_name} is a CYP2D6 substrate. This may increase {A_name} exposure and raise adverse effect risk.

references.citation: CYP2D6 inhibition can increase exposure to CYP2D6 substrates and may require closer monitoring.
